Created the design-phase backend decision record at the owned path. The document selects Express on Node.js with SQLite, records single-process runtime and durability assumptions, constrains the backend to synchronous JSON-over-HTTP CRUD for the MVP, and explicitly defers authentication and other out-of-scope capabilities.
Execution finished with status ready_for_bundle_review.

Created the backend MVP todo design contract package at the three owned paths. The package fixes the todo resource shape to `id`, `title`, `completed`, `createdAt`, and `updatedAt`, defines `GET /api/todos`, `POST /api/todos`, `PATCH /api/todos/:id`, and `DELETE /api/todos/:id`, records newest-first ordering by `createdAt` with updates that do not reorder items, sets hard-delete semantics with `204 No Content` and `404 Not Found`, and documents backend validation and mutation behavior without adding non-MVP scope or implementation-specific technology choices.
Execution finished with status ready_for_bundle_review.

Created the design-phase backend API contract at the owned path. The document freezes the MVP single-user todo CRUD surface on `/api/todos`, defines request and response JSON shapes for list/create/update/complete/uncomplete/delete, and documents strict validation plus status and structured error semantics consistent with the approved Express + SQLite decision.
Execution finished with status ready_for_bundle_review.

Validated the backend-owned SQLite foundation and tightened `apps/todo/backend/src/persistence/sqliteTodoStore.js` so persisted mutations keep `updatedAt` monotonic even when multiple writes happen within the same millisecond, while also closing owned SQLite connections if schema initialization fails. The default database path resolves to `apps/todo/backend/data/todos.sqlite`, and the repository operations now verify cleanly against the frozen MVP CRUD contract.
Execution finished with status ready_for_bundle_review.

Implemented the approved todo HTTP contract under the owned paths by adding a new Express app factory plus route and validation modules that delegate to the SQLite todo store and return contract-compliant success and error envelopes.
Execution finished with status ready_for_bundle_review.

Execution finished with status ready_for_bundle_review.
